scope: Full official Bitbucket Swagger operation ledger: all 331 operations from https://api.bitbucket.org/swagger.json are enumerated. Safe app-intent reads/writes are mapped to explicit streams, direct reads, or reverse ETL actions; every other operation remains blocked by default with typed risk metadata.

operation.reason: Administrative Bitbucket mutation is blocked by default unless modeled as an explicit confirmed reverse ETL action.
Destructive Bitbucket mutation is blocked by default unless modeled as an explicit confirmed reverse ETL action.
